records.ety: [L. inelegans: cf. F. inlgant. See In- not, and Elegant.]

defs: Not elegant; deficient in beauty, polish, refinement, grave, or ornament; wanting in anything which correct taste requires.
quotes: What order so contrived as not to mix Tastes, not well joined, inelegant.
It renders style often obscure, always embarrassed and inelegant.
